---
title: "HomePage"
output:
  html_document:
    toc: true
---



![](https://www.xjtlu.edu.cn/en/assets/image-cache/upload/ZZXy8uNxGWTAWatwd3zi.5217ba1e.jpg){width=30%}


I am a Lecturer at Xi'an Jiaotong-Liverpool University, I received the Ph.D. in Mathematics under Prof. Balakrishnan's supervison at McMaster University, Ontario, Canada in 2021. My research interests include Survival Analysis, Biostatistics, Reliability and Epidemiology.


$~$

$~$

$~$

|Contact Information:                                                              |
|:--------------------------------------------|------------------------------------|
| MB530                                       | Tel: +86 (0512)8897 3043           |
| Department of Foundational Mathematics      |                                    |
| Xi'an Jiaotong-Liverpool University         | Email: mu.he@xjtlu.edu.cn          |
| Suzhou, JiangSu, China                      |                                    |
